summary: Audit Log Export — scheduled CSV export to S3 bucket
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want to configure scheduled CSV export of audit logs to an S3 bucket so that I can maintain off-platform backups for compliance retention requirements.

The Compliance Vault module captures all data access and modification events in the audit log. Regulatory requirements often mandate that audit records be retained for extended periods in immutable storage. This feature enables automated export to customer-managed S3 buckets on a configurable schedule.

**Acceptance Criteria**:

1. Workspace admin can configure export schedule (daily/weekly/monthly) and target S3 bucket via the Compliance Vault settings UI
2. Exported CSV includes all audit log fields: timestamp, user, action, resource_type, resource_id, outcome, and session_id
3. Export job runs automatically at scheduled time and generates a new file with date-based naming (audit-log-YYYY-MM-DD.csv)
4. Failed exports are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff, and workspace admin receives notification email on permanent failure

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Implemented the scheduled export using cron-based jobs. S3 integration uses IAM role authentication. Ready for QA testing.

comments.author: dev1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: QA passed. Verified CSV format matches spec and retry logic works correctly. Moving to Done.
